{{Card Infobox|Sovereign Blade||2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Forge|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Retain|2}}{{C|Sovereign Blade||2}} is a 2 (1 if upgraded) {{Icon|RE|2}} cost {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Colorless|Colorless|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Token|Token|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack|2}} Card available to the {{KW|Regent||2}}. At its base value, it deals 10 damage to a target. The {{KW|Regent||2}} has a lot of dedicated support cards for the {{C|Sovereign Blade||2}}.
== Sources ==
The {{C|Sovereign Blade||2}} cannot be added to a player's Deck by any means. The {{C|Sovereign Blade||2}} can be created during combat with the Keyword {{KW|Forge||2}}.

=== Forge ===
The first time {{KW|Forge||2}} is played each combat, {{C|Sovereign Blade||2}} is added to the player's hand. Any subsequent time a card which {{KW|Forge|Forges|2}} is played, it adds damage to all copies of the {{C|Sovereign Blade||2}} (including exhausted copies). If the {{C|Sovereign Blade||2}} is exhausted or transformed, playing a {{KW|Forge||2}} card will create a new {{C|Sovereign Blade||2}} that does not retain the stats of the former. Powers such as {{C|Seeking Edge||2}} and {{C|Sword Sage||2}} will still impact the newly forged card.

====Cards====
* {{C|Refine Blade||2}}: {{KW|Forge||2}} 9(13).
* {{C|Spoils of Battle||2}}: {{KW|Forge||2}} 5(8).
* {{C|Wrought in War||2}}: {{KW|Forge||2}} 7(9).
* {{C|Bulwark||2}}: {{KW|Forge||2}} 10(13).
* {{C|Conqueror||2}}: {{KW|Forge||2}} 3(5).
* {{C|Furnace||2}}: {{KW|Forge||2}} 4(6) at the start of your turn.
* {{C|Summon Forth||2}}: {{KW|Forge||2}} 8(11).
* {{C|Beat into Shape||2}}: {{KW|Forge||2}} 5(7). {{KW|Forge|Forges|2}} an additional 5(7) for every other time you've hit the enemy this turn.
* {{C|Big Bang||2}}: {{KW|Forge||2}} 5.
* {{C|Seeking Edge||2}}: {{KW|Forge||2}} 7(11).
* {{C|The Smith||2}}: {{KW|Forge||2}} 30(40).
====Relics====
* {{R|Fencing Manual||2}}: {{KW|Forge||2}} 10 at the start of combat.
====Potions====
* {{P|King's Courage||2}}: {{KW|Forge||2}} 15.

== Interactions ==
=== Synergies ===
* {{C|Heirloom Hammer||2}}: Choose a {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Colorless|Colorless|2}} card in your Hand. Add a copy of that card into your Hand.
* {{R|Intimidating Helmet||2}}: Grants 4 {{KW|Block||2}} whenever this card is played.
====Sovereign Blade====
* {{C|Conqueror||2}}: {{C|Sovereign Blade||2}} deals double damage to the enemy this turn.
* {{C|Parry||2}}: Whenever you play {{C|Sovereign Blade||2}}, gain 10 (14) {{KW|Block||2}}.
* {{C|Summon Forth||2}}: Put {{C|Sovereign Blade||2}} into your Hand from anywhere.
** {{C|Summon Forth||2}} will put all copies of the {{C|Sovereign Blade||2}} into your hand, including exhausted copies.
** If the {{C|Sovereign Blade||2}} would not fit in the hand, it is instead discarded.
* {{C|Hammer Time||2}}: Whenever you {{KW|Forge||2}}, all allies {{KW|Forge||2}} as well.
* {{C|Seeking Edge||2}}: {{C|Sovereign Blade||2}} now deals damage to ALL enemies.
* {{C|Sword Sage||2}}: {{C|Sovereign Blade||2}} now hits an additional time.
====Creating Cards====
* {{C|Supermassive||2}}: Deals 3(4) additional damage for each card created this combat.
* {{C|Pillar of Creation||2}}: Whenever you create a card, gain 3(4) {{KW|Block||2}}.
* {{C|Arsenal||2}}: Whenever you create a card, gain 1 {{BD|Strength||2}}.
* {{R|Regalite||2}}: Whenever you create a card, gain 2 {{KW|Block||2}}.
====Other====
* Due to how quickly the damage value of {{C|Sovereign Blade||2}} can be raised, any multiplicative effects are highly effective at increasing its damage, including {{BD|Vulnerable||2}}, {{BD|Conqueror||2}}, and {{BD|Flanking||2}}.
* Effects that reduce the Deck, such as {{C|Tyranny||2}}, or draw cards, such as {{C|Glow||2}}, will help cycle the Deck more quickly to redraw {{C|Sovereign Blade||2}}.
* Moving the {{C|Sovereign Blade||2}} around by means of {{C|Summon Forth||2}} or {{C|Cosmic Indifference||2}} will increase the frequency with which it can be played in a Deck cycle.
* If playing as the {{2|Necrobinder}}, and the player has attained {{KW|Forge||2}} cards by means of the {{R|Prismatic Gem||2}} or {{R|Sea Glass||2}}, the {{R|Bookmark||2}} has a chance of lowering the {{Icon|CE|2}}-cost of {{C|Sovereign Blade||2}}.

=== Neutral ===
* Because the damage value {{C|Sovereign Blade||2}} can reach is so high, additive effects such as {{BD|Strength||2}} and {{BD|Vigor||2}} effects negligibly contribute to the damage of {{C|Sovereign Blade||2}} as it scales up. 
** If building a deck centered around {{KW|Forge|Forging|2}} the {{C|Sovereign Blade||2}}, Multiplicative effects will have a greater effect than additive effects for increasing damage.
=== Anti-Synergy ===
* {{C|Sovereign Blade||2}} matches up poorly against enemy powers that reduce the amount of oncoming attacks, such as {{BD|Slippery||2}} and {{BD|Hard to Kill||2}}.

== Update History ==
*'''Early Access v0.98'''
**Added Sovereign Blade to the game.
